meaning: n.斯拉夫尼亚人[语]adj.斯拉夫尼亚的,斯拉夫人[语]的
examples: The Slavonian grebe, one of Scotland's most mysterious birds, has been in decline in recent years, with breeding pairs falling from about 80 at their peak during the 1970s and 1980s to just 22 today.
Croatian troops have been moving to the border region, and Eastern Slavonian Serb soldiers are deploying to face what they see as a threat.
